hero_subtitle: SFTY Business unifies wallet screening and blockchain analytics into one workflow to enhance transaction risk analysis, case management, and audit-ready compliance for digital asset providers.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Transaction reviews slow with disconnected data
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to integrate wallet risk, transaction signals and sanctions exposure due to fragmented provider outputs. This creates manual work, inconsistent risk visibility and gaps in audit-ready transaction evidence across cases and reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction risk signals and sanctions exposure into unified case workflows that streamline reviews, preserve audit evidence and enhance risk visibility for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals, routes alerts into reviewable cases, records decisions with preserved evidence, and prepares audit-ready compliance reports.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASPs a provider-neutral layer that links wallet activity, transaction risk, alerts and sanctions into audit-ready cases and structured compliance workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing wallet and transaction risk with audit-ready evidence and governance for secure, enterprise-grade compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support transaction monitoring workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet risks link to transaction case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports transaction risk investigations
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for scalable KYT compliance controls
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction risk, provider outputs and regulatory updates into structured workflows to support compliance teams in managing digital asset transaction monitoring and risk assessment.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage transaction workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates KYT alerts, blockchain analytics and sanctions signals into linked cases, enabling review, decision logging, escalation and evidence capture within transactional compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in an audit-ready format, supporting transparency and traceability of compliance decisions and reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and integrates outputs from KYC, KYT, blockchain analytics and other compliance tools into one cohesive workflow without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYT and analytics providers, connecting their outputs into structured compliance cases and workflows rather than replacing core analytics or screening systems.
final_title: Structure transaction monitoring into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects wallet risk, transaction analytics, sanctions signals and case evidence for connected compliance control.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
